Announcement Regarding Dec 31, 2025

Within the scope of the New Year's Eve security measures taken by the

Governorship of Istanbul

, several roads in the districts of

will be closed to traffic on

.

Due to these restrictions, all educational and administrative activities at our university will be suspended as of

on

.

The classes affected by this suspension will be rescheduled for a later date, and the compensation schedule will be announced accordingly.

https://www.istanbul.gov.tr/basin-aciklamasi-2025-92
